text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Aaargggh! I can't believe I got<n>injured this baaad!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Shiraoki, why have you forsaken<n>meeee!
choice_data_list: I feel like you're exaggerating a little.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You say that, but it's such a serious<n>injury... This
is decisive proof that the<n>great Shiraoki is no
longer looking out<n>for me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Urk... Who even am I without the<n>grace of
Shiraoki?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I'm a fried egg with no yolk!
choice_data_list: Let's pay a visit to the shrine, then.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hic... We should... I'd like to pleadto my case to Shiraoki.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'll say that I still have more potential<n>in me... That
I'll work really hard... So<n>please... don't abandon
my pitiful,<n>no-good self.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: But should my plea go ignored, I'll...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm w-willing to give my precious<n>5,000-yen bill as
an offering...

We go to a nearby shrine together,<n>but neither
Matikanefukukitaru's<n>spirits nor her motivation
show much<n>sign of returning. This situation has
really dampened her mood.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh?! T-Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Urk... I think it's amazing how you're<n>able to say
stuff like that so<n>confidently.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm so wishy-washy in comparison.<n>We're like
apples and oranges.<n>Except I'm just a crab apple
and<n>you're an... orange.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Just a sad little craaab apple.

Being miserable doesn't help with<n>healing
injuries... It takes a long time<n>for her to make a full
recovery.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: But... I have no one left. I'm all alone...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Waaah! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I'll work really hard... I promise!

Matikanefukukitaru and I both focus<n>our efforts on
recovery, determined to<n>get back to training!
